ID3DXBuffer::GetBufferPointer

Retrieves a pointer to the data in the buffer.

LPVOID GetBufferPointer();

Parameters

None.

Return Values

Returns a pointer to the data in the buffer.

Requirements

  Header: Declared in d3dx8mesh.h.
  Import Library: Use d3dx8.lib.
